summary: Candidate shows solid foundations with specific gaps that are addressable within a structured learning plan.

skill_evaluation.justification: Demonstrates strong understanding of Python and REST APIs. Lacks deep production experience specifically with FastAPI but understands the core concepts.
Candidate clearly articulated how to use EXPLAIN ANALYZE and implement partial indexes. Real-world experience reducing latency is evident.
Candidate knows Docker but has no practical experience with Kubernetes or container orchestration at scale. Failed to explain Pods or Deployments.
evidence: I mostly use raw Docker containers

key_gaps.reason: Scored 2.8/10. Role requires deploying and managing services on Kubernetes, but candidate only has single-node Docker experience.
Skill missing entirely from resume and candidate struggled to explain pub/sub mechanics during assessment.

adjacent_skills.rationale: Essential for modern backend deployment and directly required by the JD.
adjacent_skills.why_adjacent: Candidate already has strong Docker experience; Kubernetes is the natural next step.

learning_plan.outcome: Can deploy a simple multi-container application to a local Minikube cluster.

resources.title: TechWorld with Nana: Kubernetes Crash Course

learning_plan.outcome: Can build a simple producer/consumer system in Python processing 10k messages/sec.

final_recommendation: Use the learning plan to close priority gaps. Reassess in 4-8 weeks with a targeted technical challenge focusing on Kubernetes and Event-driven systems.
